source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Crane Other Lifting

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - West Delta Block 109

event.top_event: Injury from uncontrolled pressure release and whipping hose
actions_taken: Basic first aid provided on location
Injured person transported by motor vessel to Grand Isle, LA
Injured person transported by motor vehicle to medical facility in Thibodaux, LA
Documentation and photos reviewed by BSEE investigator
event.summary: On 6 April 2022 at 1215 hours, a contractor from Paradigm Flow Solutions USA Inc. was injured while bleeding down pressure from a Flexi-Coil hose system on platform WD 109 A. The injured person accidentally fully opened a ball valve while a needle valve was simultaneously open, causing rapid pressure release. The Flexi-Coil hose whipped uncontrollably, striking the coil reel unit. The ball valve broke apart and the handle struck the injured person's right thumb, causing a laceration. The injured person was wearing latex gloves instead of impact-resistant gloves and was evacuated to a medical facility onshore.

hazards.name: High pressure energy in Flexi-Coil system
Projectile hazard from ball valve components

threats.name: Simultaneous opening of ball valve and needle valve causing rapid pressure release
Flexi-Coil hose not secured, allowing uncontrolled whipping
Ball valve structural failure under impact

consequences.name: Evacuation of injured person requiring offshore transport

controls.name: Needle valve for controlled pressure bleed-down

supporting_text: they began bleeding down the pressure from 10,000 psi to 6,000 psi through a needle valve located at the discharge of the pump
The IP should have continued to release pressure through the needle valve until pressure was sufficiently bled down

controls.name: Hose securement to prevent uncontrolled movement
controls.barrier_role: Prevent hose whipping and uncontrolled motion

supporting_text: The Flexi-Coil hose was not secured to anything which would have prevented it from uncontrollably moving around
The end of the Flexi-Coil hose was not secured to prevent it from moving and pulling through the horse head

controls.name: Impact-resistant gloves for high-pressure equipment work
controls.barrier_role: Personal protective equipment to reduce injury severity
controls.lod_basis: Last line of defense against hand injury

supporting_text: The IP was wearing latex gloves at the time of the incident because he was handling hydraulic fluid prior to the bleed down
The IP was wearing latex gloves but should have been wearing impact resistant gloves while working with high pressure equipment

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for pressure testing procedure
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify hazards and safe work procedures
controls.lod_basis: Pre-job hazard identification and procedure definition

supporting_text: Prior to beginning the pipeline corrective action job, Paradigm personnel needed to pressure test the Flexi-Coil hose
Job Safety Analysis (JSA), and other documentation received

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
